title: Traditional Ukrainian Paella
description: A hearty, flavorful dish blending Ukrainian and Spanish influences. This one-pot meal is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: 1. Heat the Muscovy broth in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté until translucent.
3. Add the garlic and red bell pepper, cooking for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the paella rice, smoked paprika, and stir to combine.
5. Add the Muscovy duck, skin side down, and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add the fired morcilla slices, nestling them among the rice.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
9. Slice the Muscovy duck and serve alongside the paella.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
